description_long: This is a heavily worn, low-top sneaker made primarily of blue denim fabric with significant fraying and tears throughout the upper. The shoe features white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the eyelets are reinforced but surrounded by distressed material. The sole is white rubber, visibly dirty and scuffed, with a low profile and no visible tread pattern from these views. The interior lining is exposed in several places due to the extensive wear, and the heel area is particularly frayed. The overall appearance suggests prolonged use and exposure to rough conditions, making it a distinctive urban personal item.
description: A heavily worn blue denim sneaker with white laces and a distressed, frayed upper, featuring a white rubber sole.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the frayed heel and exposed inner lining, with the back seam and some of the sole visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the extensive tears and fraying along the upper, as well as the full length of the white laces.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the toe area with prominent rips and the lacing system, as well as the rounded, scuffed sole.
description_view_3: Right side view showing additional fraying and wear, with the sole and side profile of the shoe clearly visible.
